name: Twin Dragon Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a blender, grind half a cup of blanched almonds until fine. Add this to the flour mixture.
4. Cream the sugar, lard, almond extract, egg, and water in another bowl. Stir in this wet mixture into the dry ingredients until combined.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet, about 2 inches apart.
6. Press one whole almond into the center of each ball, flattening slightly with your fingers.
7. Lightly brush each cookie with beaten egg.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned.
Makes 2 dozen cookies.
